4.3Directives

Documentation

Welcome to the Marque documentation set. Start with quickstart, then move to configuration and advanced layout/theme usage.

Quickstart

Install flow, local serve workflow, and publishing sequence.
Go to quickstart ->

Themes

Build themes with plain CSS variables and manual overrides.
Open theme docs ->

Configuration

Learn marque.toml, frontmatter precedence, and page-level overrides.
Open configuration ->

Layouts

See layout overrides and summary-driven navigation in action.
Open layouts ->

Core directives

  • @container
  • @row + @card
  • @callout
  • @stat
  • spotlight / section (hero is a legacy alias)
  • divider

Frontmatter essentials

  • title: browser title segment and nav display label.
  • nav: output slug / target HTML filename.
  • layout, theme, width: page-level overrides.

Navigation order

  • Use summary.mq to define navbar labels and page ordering.
  • Frontmatter order is deprecated.

Use title for human-readable labels and nav for stable machine-friendly URLs.

Built with Marque
